name: Spicy Shrimp & Pork Salad (Yam Vietnam)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the coriander, garlic, pepper, vinegar, lime juice, salt, sugar, and chili peppers.
2. Add the pork, shrimp, and cucumber to the bowl.
3. Toss lightly until all ingredients are evenly mixed.
4. Sprinkle with mint.
